ratings.comment: Content is not easy, but econometrics itself is by no means a simple topic. Exams are predictable, so I would say it's overall a fair game. Handouts will be really helpful for making mind maps. Prof.Yata is actually knowledgeable and can answers many questions which beyond our scope. Accessible and willing to help outside of class.

Slides were very helpful and usually had all the information you'd need to succeed in the class (once Kohei released the annotated version of slides, that is). I appreciated that he included modern economic research in the slides, it made the material more engaging. Practice exams were incredibly similar to the exams we received. Overall good prof.
A slides redaing Robot who had no idea of all the material.
